audit_items.proof_trace: isValidSignature fully validates all order parameters against current auction state and price: (M2) GPv2Order.hash check ensures tamper-proof order identity; (M3+M8) active auction and duration guards confirm the auction is live at settlement time; (M9) _getAssetOutAmount with live block.timestamp enforces current minimum buy amount (conservative mulDivUp rounding); (M4/M5/M7/M11-M14) remaining checks constrain buy token, receiver, balance, fee, kind, fillability, and balance markers — covering every field a CowSwap solver could manipulate.
